说明: 陈悦：高中数学教师向 OC（bob 头、黑框眼镜、OL 气质）。固化层只锁容貌/体型/服装；姿势、表情、场景、光线在每次 cg_scene 里单独写。

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: adult woman, medium breasts, slim waist, mature female body, hourglass figure
固化.容貌与发型: asian, brown eyes, black hair, short hair, bob cut, blunt bangs, black-framed eyewear, glasses, fair skin, natural skin tone, defined eyelashes, subtle makeup, thin eyebrows
固化.气质与年龄感: office lady, teacher, mature female, elegant, professional appearance, 28 years old, aged up, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: white dress shirt, collared shirt, long sleeves, button-up shirt, fitted shirt, shirt tucked in
服装固化.下装: black pencil skirt, knee-length skirt, tight skirt, form-fitting, high-waisted skirt
服装固化.腿部: black pantyhose, black sheer stockings, legwear
服装固化.鞋履: black low-heel pumps, closed-toe shoes, formal shoes
服装固化.配饰: thin silver wristwatch, small silver stud earrings
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face

负面提示词_通用: lowres, worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, censored, bar censor, mosaic censor, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad proportions, bad perspective
负面提示词_外貌纠错: blonde hair, blue eyes, green eyes, red eyes, child, loli, shota, toddler face, baby face, young looking, teen, petite, muscular female, old woman, wrinkled face, grey hair, white hair, bald, no glasses, round glasses, sunglasses, long hair, twintails, ponytail, drill hair, 2girls, multiple girls, multiple people, male, man
负面提示词_服装纠错: different outfit, outfit change, casual clothes, t-shirt, hoodie, bikini, swimsuit, nude, naked, topless, pantless, no skirt, different skirt, jeans, shorts, overalls, apron

版本.变更摘要: 名称改为本名陈悦；说明与角色档案对齐
